location.office_time_required: 4 days a week in Mountain View office

level_signals: 5+ years of experience in product management
Experience spanning customer-facing surfaces and internal capabilities

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5+ years of experience in product management at SaaS companies, primarily serving large enterprises with responsibilities spanning customer-facing surfaces and features as well as internal capabilities and services.
You have a strong technical background and experience with API-first products, integration paths, and 3rd party product partnerships.
You are an excellent written and verbal communicator.
You have a proven track record of taking ownership, taking initiative, and delivering results.
You collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners.
You have a learning and growth mindset.
You are mission-first and understand that your success is measured by your product and team's success.
You are an early adopter in building with or adopting AI for your own product craft and you are excited about helping customers accelerate their own AI adoption journey.

scope.surface: Glean Connectors — connectors library, product integrations, Indexing API, and custom connector capabilities
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS, Work AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Breadth and depth of connectors library
Indexing API usage and custom connector adoption
core_responsibilities: Improve and deepen existing product integrations
Improve Indexing API and custom connector capabilities
Spend time with customers to deeply understand their knowledge needs
Develop key parts of the product roadmap, marrying customers' needs with product vision
Empower the team by giving context, setting direction, and building alignment
Drive customer-focused decisions, clear prioritization, and efficient execution
Coordinate cross-functionally with leadership, go-to-market teams, and other key stakeholders
Build processes that will scale as team and company go through rapid growth

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as potential eligibility; form not specified

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and wide ($165K–$280K base)
Clear product surface and ownership area (Connectors, Indexing API, custom connectors)
Company has strong market recognition (Fast Company Top 10, CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes AI 50)
1,000+ employees and customers across 50+ industries signals scale and stability
Comprehensive benefits package including home office stipend, education and wellness stipends
red_flags: Requires 4 days per week in Mountain View office — very high in-person commitment, eliminates remote candidates
Compensation range is extremely wide ($115K spread), making level and seniority difficult to assess
No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or work authorization requirements
Nice-to-haves section is entirely absent — difficult to differentiate candidates on secondary criteria

fields_inferred_not_stated: scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from comp language: 'Compensation offered will be determined by factors such as location')
ambiguities: The compensation range ($165K–$280K) is unusually wide, making it unclear whether this role is mid, senior, or staff level. Seniority treated as Senior IC based on 5+ years requirement.
Variable compensation and equity mentioned as possible eligibility but not confirmed as part of the standard package.
